title: Multi-Timeframe Momentum Confirmation Filter
summary: Implement a multi-timeframe momentum check (daily, weekly, monthly) that requires at least 2 of 3 timeframes to confirm momentum direction before the momentum dimension scores above 7. Research on time-series momentum shows that combining short-run momentum with fundamentals and multi-horizon confirmation significantly outperforms single-horizon momentum both in-sample and out-of-sample. This is practical with yfinance and directly addresses the known problem of trend signals firing during intraday noise.
expected_impact: +2-3% win rate by requiring momentum alignment across 3 timeframes before issuing long signal; reduces false positives from single-timeframe noise
